## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated (`pnpm test` passes)
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] Docs updated if behaviour changed
- [ ] Respects package boundaries (see CONTRIBUTING.md — no Node/Electron in `ui`, etc.)
- [ ] No new `Date.now()`/randomness in asserted output (determinism)
